INSERT INTO sentiments VALUES ('Шарик - хороший пёс'), ('Шарик - пёс'), ('Шарик - плохой пёс');
SELECT text, detectTonality(text) AS tonality FROM sentiments WHERE tonality > 0;
SELECT detectTonality(text) AS tonality FROM (SELECT text FROM sentiments WHERE text LIKE '%пёс%') AS filtered_sentiments;
CREATE TABLE sentiment_analysis AS SELECT detectTonality(text) AS tonality FROM sentiments;
INSERT INTO sentiment_analysis SELECT detectTonality(text) FROM (SELECT text FROM sentiments WHERE detectTonality(text) IS NOT NULL);

WITH (SELECT detectTonality(text) FROM sentiments) AS tonality_values SELECT avg(tonality_values) AS average_tonality FROM (SELECT detectTonality(text) AS tonality FROM sentiments WHERE length(text) < 50);
SELECT text, detectTonality(text) AS tonality FROM (SELECT text FROM sentiments ORDER BY length(text) DESC LIMIT 10) AS ordered_sentiments;
SELECT detectTonality('Это - невероятный опыт!'), detectTonality('Ужасный день.') AS negative;
WITH (SELECT detectTonality(text) AS tonality FROM sentiments WHERE tonality IS NOT NULL) SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM sentiments WHERE text IS NOT NULL);
